jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #18
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 190400
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 018//
RMKS/
1. TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 018    
   02 ACTIVE TROPICAL CYCLONES IN EASTPAC

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
    ---
